notes: Fixed saving to device not working in the installed app (Export, the spreadsheet export, and the restore-point download icon all shared this bug): saves were writing to a folder that needs a storage permission this app doesn't request, so the file could silently fail to appear anywhere. Saves now go through the device's native Save/Share screen instead, so you pick exactly where the file goes (Files, Drive, email, etc.) and get immediate confirmation it worked.
